faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Mount Pleasant, Westchester?
faqs.answer: Mount Pleasant homeowners most frequently encounter house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and orb weavers. While black widows are rare, they can occasionally be found in undisturbed areas like woodpiles or sheds. Our technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all spider species common to the Westchester area.
